//: Claude Code harness-hook template. Merge the `hooks` block into your repo's .claude/settings.json (or settings.local.json). It runs the SAME pre-commit / pre-push scripts in hooks/ before the model executes a git commit / git push, so failures block the tool call (exit 2) and the model self-corrects. Complements the git-level hooks (install.sh); use either or both. $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR is set by Claude Code to the repo root.
